synopsis: Celebrate the powerful friendship between Grogu and Din Djarin in this adorable pop-up storybook! When the Mandalorian accepted the assignment to deliver an asset, he never expected that the package he'd secure would be an orphaned child. What began as a job turned into something more as Din Djarin grew closer to Grogu, an alien child strong in the Force. Experience key moments in their journey together in this engaging pop-up storybook from acclaimed paper engineer Matthew Reinhart featuring memorable scenes from all seasons of The Mandalorian and a peek into the new film The Mandalorian & Grogu recreated in engaging pop-ups. From Grogu's first meeting with Din Djarin to his studies among the Jedi and ultimately his determination to learn the Way of the Mandalore and become Din Grogu, this delightful pop-up storybook is the perfect book for the whole family to enjoy Grogu's journey together.
title: The Mandalorian: Adventures with Grogu
